workflowConfig.name: Contract Comparison
workflowConfig.description: Compare multiple legal contracts using chunk-level RAG search to identify differences and frequently amended clauses, producing a structured DOCX comparison report

baseFileId.description: File storage ID of the base contract

comparisonFileIds.description: File storage IDs of contracts to compare against

stepsConfig.name: Search Similar Passages in Comparison Docs

config.description: Skip comparison if no similar passages found in comparison documents

config.name: Contract Clause Comparator
config.systemPrompt: You are an expert legal document analyst specializing in contract comparison. Produce structured, self-contained clause analyses with difference tables including legal significance. Use precise legal terminology. Do NOT include standalone summary sections, risk matrices, overall conclusions, or cross-clause commentary.
config.userPrompt:
Compare the following base contract clause with similar passages found in comparison contracts.

## Base Clause from "{{baseDocName}}" (Chunk {{loop.item.index}})
{{loop.item.content}}

## Comparison Documents
The following documents are being compared against the base contract:
{{comparisonDocNames|join(', ')}}

## Similar Passages Found via RAG Search
{{steps.search_similar.output.data.results|formatList('{filename}: {content}', '

---

')}}

## Output Format
**Clause Type:** [one-line identification, e.g., Indemnification, Limitation of Liability, Termination]

You MUST include a section for EVERY comparison document listed above, even if no matching passages were found in the RAG search results.

For each comparison document, output a table:

### [Document filename]
| Aspect | Classification | Description | Legal Significance |
|--------|---------------|-------------|--------------------|
| ... | Addition/Deletion/Modification/Rewording | Factual description (1-2 sentences) | Brief note on legal impact |

Rules:
- One row per difference
- Classification must be exactly one of: Addition, Deletion, Modification, Rewording
- Keep descriptions to 1-2 sentences
- Legal Significance should be a brief factual note (e.g., 'Shifts performance risk to buyer', 'Eliminates seller financing')
- If no differences found for a document, state 'No material differences identified'
- If no matching passages were found for a comparison document in the RAG search results above, output: '**No corresponding clause found in this document.** This clause from the base contract does not appear to have an equivalent provision in [document filename].'
- Do NOT add standalone summary sections, risk matrices, or overall conclusions after the tables

config.name: Contract Comparison Overview
config.systemPrompt: You are an expert legal analyst. Generate a brief executive introduction for a contract comparison report. Be professional and concise.
